mapper.select: SELECT * FROM item_borrow_record WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item_borrow_record (item_id, cabinet_id, slot_id, quantity, returned_quantity, borrower, borrow_operator, borrow_operator_no, borrow_operator_name, return_operator, return_operator_no, return_operator_name, borrow_time, expected_return_time, borrower_reminder_hours, admin_reminder_hours, borrower_reminded_at, admin_reminded_at, return_time, status, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{cabinetId}, #{slotId}, #{quantity}, #{returnedQuantity}, #{borrower}, #{borrowOperator}, #{borrowOperatorNo}, #{borrowOperatorName}, #{returnOperator}, #{returnOperatorNo}, #{returnOperatorName}, #{borrowTime}, #{expectedReturnTime}, #{borrowerReminderHours}, #{adminReminderHours}, #{borrowerRemindedAt}, #{adminRemindedAt}, #{returnTime}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, COALESCE(#{deleted}, 0))
mapper.update: UPDATE item_borrow_record SET item_id = #{itemId}, cabinet_id = #{cabinetId}, slot_id = #{slotId}, quantity = #{quantity}, returned_quantity = #{returnedQuantity}, borrower = #{borrower}, borrow_operator = #{borrowOperator}, borrow_operator_no = #{borrowOperatorNo}, borrow_operator_name = #{borrowOperatorName}, return_operator = #{returnOperator}, return_operator_no = #{returnOperatorNo}, return_operator_name = #{returnOperatorName}, borrow_time = #{borrowTime}, expected_return_time = #{expectedReturnTime}, borrower_reminder_hours = #{borrowerReminderHours}, admin_reminder_hours = #{adminReminderHours}, borrower_reminded_at = #{borrowerRemindedAt}, admin_reminded_at = #{adminRemindedAt}, return_time = #{returnTime}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT br.id, br.item_id, i.name AS item_name, i.category, i.spec, br.cabinet_id, c.cabinet_no, c.name AS cabinet_name, br.slot_id, cs.slot_no, br.quantity, br.returned_quantity, (br.quantity - br.returned_quantity) AS pending_quantity, br.borrower, br.borrow_operator, br.borrow_operator_no, br.borrow_operator_name, br.return_operator, br.return_operator_no, br.return_operator_name, br.borrow_time, br.expected_return_time, br.borrower_reminder_hours, br.admin_reminder_hours, br.borrower_reminded_at, br.admin_reminded_at, CASE WHEN br.expected_return_time IS NULL OR br.borrower_reminder_hours IS NULL OR br.borrower_reminder_hours <= 0 THEN NULL WHEN br.borrower_reminded_at IS NULL THEN br.expected_return_time ELSE DATE_ADD(br.borrower_reminded_at, INTERVAL br.borrower_reminder_hours HOUR) END AS next_borrower_reminder_time, CASE WHEN br.expected_return_time IS NULL OR br.admin_reminder_hours IS NULL OR br.admin_reminder_hours <= 0 THEN NULL WHEN br.admin_reminded_at IS NULL THEN DATE_ADD(br.expected_return_time, INTERVAL br.admin_reminder_hours HOUR) ELSE DATE_ADD(br.admin_reminded_at, INTERVAL br.admin_reminder_hours HOUR) END AS next_admin_reminder_time, br.return_time, br.status, br.remark FROM item_borrow_record br LEFT JOIN item i ON br.item_id = i.id AND i.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN cabinet c ON br.cabinet_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN cabinet_slot cs ON br.slot_id = cs.id AND cs.deleted = 0 WHERE br.deleted = 0 AND br.id = #{id}

SELECT br.id, br.item_id, i.name AS item_name, i.category, i.spec, br.cabinet_id, c.cabinet_no, c.name AS cabinet_name, br.slot_id, cs.slot_no, br.quantity, br.returned_quantity, (br.quantity - br.returned_quantity) AS pending_quantity, br.borrower, br.borrow_operator, br.borrow_operator_no, br.borrow_operator_name, br.return_operator, br.return_operator_no, br.return_operator_name, br.borrow_time, br.expected_return_time, br.borrower_reminder_hours, br.admin_reminder_hours, br.borrower_reminded_at, br.admin_reminded_at, CASE WHEN br.expected_return_time IS NULL OR br.borrower_reminder_hours IS NULL OR br.borrower_reminder_hours <= 0 THEN NULL WHEN br.borrower_reminded_at IS NULL THEN br.expected_return_time ELSE DATE_ADD(br.borrower_reminded_at, INTERVAL br.borrower_reminder_hours HOUR) END AS next_borrower_reminder_time, CASE WHEN br.expected_return_time IS NULL OR br.admin_reminder_hours IS NULL OR br.admin_reminder_hours <= 0 THEN NULL WHEN br.admin_reminded_at IS NULL THEN DATE_ADD(br.expected_return_time, INTERVAL br.admin_reminder_hours HOUR) ELSE DATE_ADD(br.admin_reminded_at, INTERVAL br.admin_reminder_hours HOUR) END AS next_admin_reminder_time, br.return_time, br.status, br.remark FROM item_borrow_record br LEFT JOIN item i ON br.item_id = i.id AND i.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN cabinet c ON br.cabinet_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN cabinet_slot cs ON br.slot_id = cs.id AND cs.deleted = 0 WHERE br.deleted = 0 AND br.status IN (0, 2) AND br.expected_return_time IS NOT NULL AND ( (#{reminderType} = 'borrower' AND br.borrower_reminder_hours IS NOT NULL AND br.borrower_reminder_hours > 0 AND ( (br.borrower_reminded_at IS NULL AND br.expected_return_time <= NOW()) OR (br.borrower_reminded_at IS NOT NULL AND DATE_ADD(br.borrower_reminded_at, INTERVAL br.borrower_reminder_hours HOUR) <= NOW()) ) ) OR (#{reminderType} = 'admin' AND br.admin_reminder_hours IS NOT NULL AND br.admin_reminder_hours > 0 AND ( (br.admin_reminded_at IS NULL AND DATE_ADD(br.expected_return_time, INTERVAL br.admin_reminder_hours HOUR) <= NOW()) OR (br.admin_reminded_at IS NOT NULL AND DATE_ADD(br.admin_reminded_at, INTERVAL br.admin_reminder_hours HOUR) <= NOW()) ) ) ) ORDER BY br.expected_return_time ASC, br.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE item_borrow_record SET borrower_reminded_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE item_borrow_record SET admin_reminded_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
